productTitle: MikroTik Rackmount kit for RB5009/L009 series
name: MikroTik Rackmount kit for RB5009/L009 series
title: MikroTik Rackmount kit for RB5009/L009 series
short_description: Kit for mounting RB5009 devices in 1U rackmounts
description: The MikroTik K-79 is a durable and precisely engineered rack ear kit designed to mount your MikroTik RB5009 or L009 series router securely into a standard 19-inch server rack. Made from high-quality metal, it ensures a reliable and stable installation while maintaining a clean, professional appearance in your network setup.

detailed_description.heading: Secure Rack Mounting for RB5009/L009 Series
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik K-79 is a durable and precisely engineered rack ear kit designed to mount your MikroTik RB5009 or L009 series router securely into a standard 19-inch server rack. Made from high-quality metal, it ensures a reliable and stable installation while maintaining a clean, professional appearance in your network setup. The K-79 provides a simple and efficient way to integrate MikroTik devices into rack environments commonly used in data centers, offices, or structured home networks. Its straightforward design allows for quick installation and a perfect fit, ensuring that your equipment stays securely in place. Whether you are upgrading an existing rack system or setting up new network hardware, the K-79 offers a practical and space-saving solution for professional MikroTik mounting needs.

comments.name: Janno
comments.text: Good if you don't have 3d printer and need to stack up some switches.

comments.name: Dan
comments.text: This is an ingenious design for mounting brackets. The same kit will hold 1, 2, 3 or 4 units in a standard rack mount 19” design. Great for dense deployments where space is at a premium.
